THIRTY · WINTER CHALLENGE 2026
The Challenge
The Challenge
WHAT IS THIRTY?

30 days of building habits that stick — across training, nutrition, recovery and mental wellbeing. This isn't about perfection. It's about showing up every single day.

01
DAILY MOVEMENT
S30 class, run, S30TRACK or at-home workout. Stretch+Flex every 2nd Sunday.
30–45 mins daily
02
NUTRITION
Follow a meal plan. Guidelines and macros supplied.
Guide supplied
03
DAILY RECOVERY
Stretch, sauna, ice bath, massage or yoga.
10–30 mins daily
04
MENTAL WELLBEING
Reading, journalling or meditation.
10–20 mins daily
✕ No Alcohol
✕ No Vaping
✕ No Doomscrolling

Events
Mark the Calendar
CHALLENGE EVENTS.
W/C 26 MAY — DATE TBC
INFO NIGHT
Free. Walk members through everything. Drive last-minute sign-ups. Each studio chooses their own date — we recommend the week before June 1.
All Welcome
SUN 1 JUNE
CHALLENGE KICKS OFF
Day 1. 5am. Members log first activities in the THIRTY tab.
5AM Start
SAT 27 JUNE
POWERLIFTING COMP
All studios, same day. Retest your squat, bench and deadlift in a social community setting.
All Studios · Up to +40 pts
MON 30 JUNE
FINAL DAY
Day 30. Points finalised. Leaderboard locked. Done.
Challenge Ends
FRI 3 JULY
MOVIE NIGHT + PRIZE GIVING
All welcome. Celebrate THIRTY. Studios award leaderboard prizes. Time TBC.
All Welcome · +5 pts

Incentives
OFFERS & INCENTIVES.

NEW MEMBER JOURNEY
Non-members who complete THIRTY and join S30 receive either a 1:1 goal setting session or 1 week free. The perfect pathway into membership.
